prompt: I need to migrate the Confetti KMP project (github.com/joreilly/Confetti) to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.13.1. The shared module uses kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.library. The androidApp uses kotlin("android") which is now built-in. Please analyze and migrate it.
source: joreilly/Confetti — shared has KMP+library (Path A), androidApp has kotlin.android, uses Apollo + KMMBridge + Roborazzi
agent_rubric: The shared module's com.android.library plugin is replaced with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
The shared module's android {} block is nested inside kotlin { } (not at top level)
The org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin is removed from androidApp (AGP 9 has built-in Kotlin)
Third-party plugin compatibility is addressed (Apollo GraphQL, KMMBridge, or Roborazzi)
The version catalog has a plugin alias for com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
